description_long: This object is a small, shrine-like pagoda structure with a steeply pitched, stone-textured roof and a prominent ornamental finial at the apex. The roof is a single, broad tier with a rough, weathered appearance, and the eaves are straight rather than upturned. The main body of the pagoda is enclosed by low, stone-textured walls, with an open front section that suggests a space for offerings or a small altar. The base consists of a raised platform with steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by two bench-like extensions on either side. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray and black, giving the structure a somber, stone-like presence. This pagoda would likely serve as a small religious or commemorative structure in an urban park or garden setting.
description: A compact, stone-textured pagoda with a single steep roof, ornamental finial, and open front on a raised platform with benches. The structure is predominantly gray and black, evoking a solemn, shrine-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, steps, and both side benches clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the left bench and the depth of the platform and roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall and the full expanse of the roof.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, showing the right bench and the open front.
